title: Auto provenance manifest + CI lint gate
context: Provenance is promoted to a CI gate: every pipeline run auto-emits a provenance.json and the lint blocks release on incompleteness (PLAN §6/§8). This guarantees every released artefact is traceable. Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Auto-generate a provenance manifest per pipeline run and enforce completeness via a CI lint gate that blocks release on missing fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Each pipeline run auto-emits a provenance.json conforming to the ratified spec.
A CI lint gate validates the manifest and blocks merge/release when fields are missing or invalid.
Manifest captures container digests, tool versions, input/output checksums, seed and parameters.
Commit is DCO signed-off; no secrets in manifests or logs.
output: A pull request adding auto provenance-manifest generation and a CI lint gate.
